name: CFO Fitness Agent
description: A health-and-fitness coaching agent ("the CFO") that plans and executes multi-step coaching tasks: logging nutrition and workouts, scoring a daily visceral-fat metric, and auditing its own reasoning. Built with Gemini 3 and instrumented with Arize Phoenix for trace-level oversight.

skills.name: Log nutrition
skills.description: Parse a meal and log macros to the user ledger.

skills.name: Log exercise
skills.description: Log a workout with wearable-accuracy adjustment.

skills.name: Score the day
skills.description: Run the metabolic engine to produce the daily VF score.

skills.name: Audit reasoning
skills.description: Pull recorded Arize Phoenix traces and explain how a score was produced.
